agency_intel.text: Three global tripwires could turn the agencies' life & health view from confirmatory to defensive: a substantial increase in regulatory scrutiny, more stress on financial markets, or signs of deterioration in asset quality. Evidence on any of them shifts the meeting tone.

Increasing agency concern around large-scale M&A reshaping the life insurance sector. For Japanese insurers specifically, agencies expect international M&A to limit capital growth — be ready on the capital-trajectory implications of overseas acquisition appetite.
